records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope we meet again.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Chifuyu! Look at this! It is a rollercoaster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chifuyu! Look at this! It is a rollercoaster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My lady, you should not run in such a crowded area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My lady, you should not run in such a crowded area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My lady, you should not run in such a crowded area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, when else will I be able to run around like this? Sanae also told me to have fun, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, when else will I be able to run around like this? Sanae also told me to have fun, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, when else will I be able to run around like this? Sanae also told me to have fun, you know.

records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... correct, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... correct, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you want to ride the rollercoaster together? You have never been on one, have you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you want to ride the rollercoaster together? You have never been on one, have you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you want to ride the rollercoaster together? You have never been on one, have you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A rollercoaster... I guess it would be fine to enjoy my time with you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A rollercoaster... I guess it would be fine to enjoy my time with you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A rollercoaster... I guess it would be fine to enjoy my time with you, my lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us get on, Chifuyu. W-wait! Do you think I will not meet the ride height?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us get on, Chifuyu. W-wait! Do you think I will not meet the ride height?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us get on, Chifuyu. W-wait! Do you think I will not meet the ride height?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Fortunately, you're taller than the minimum. Let us keep going.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Fortunately, you're taller than the minimum. Let us keep going.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Fortunately, you're taller than the minimum. Let us keep going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah! It is thrilling to feel the wind against your skin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah! It is thrilling to feel the wind against your skin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah! It is thrilling to feel the wind against your skin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also liked the feeling of gravity pressing on my body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also liked the feeling of gravity pressing on my body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also liked the feeling of gravity pressing on my body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An extreme sport. How fun!
records.m_Talk_DEU: An extreme sport. How fun!
records.m_Talk_FRA: An extreme sport. How fun!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chifuyu, you had fun too, right? Shall we go again?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Chifuyu, you had fun too, right? Shall we go again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chifuyu?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm feeling...

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm feeling...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rollercoaster... is a terrifying device.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rollercoaster... is a terrifying device.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rollercoaster... is a terrifying device.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will have to train harder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will have to train harder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will have to train harder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, drink some water.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, drink some water.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, drink some water.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, my lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am glad you seem to be enjoying yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am glad you seem to be enjoying yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am glad you seem to be enjoying yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Well, we came here to have fun, did we not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Well, we came here to have fun, did we not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Well, we came here to have fun, did we not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have let go of my duties as the head of our family and I am having fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have let go of my duties as the head of our family and I am having fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have let go of my duties as the head of our family and I am having fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you should do the same.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe. Yes. I like this awkwardly smiling Chifuyu.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I would like something that looks a bit more natural...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I would like something that looks a bit more natural...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I would like something that looks a bit more natural...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you raise one arm with confidence? Like a general returning from battle with good news.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you raise one arm with confidence? Like a general returning from battle with good news.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you raise one arm with confidence? Like a general returning from battle with good news.

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, yes. Good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, yes. Good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, yes. Good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A victorious general atop a merry-go-round. What a great picture.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A victorious general atop a merry-go-round. What a great picture.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A victorious general atop a merry-go-round. What a great picture.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will have this printed on a big canvas to frame it in my room.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will have this printed on a big canvas to frame it in my room.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will have this printed on a big canvas to frame it in my room.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should show this to Sanae too. What do you think, Chifuyu?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should show this to Sanae too. What do you think, Chifuyu?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should show this to Sanae too. What do you think, Chifuyu?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I-I... feel embarass
8g

I-I... feel embarass
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I-I... feel embarass

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, the Ferris wheel! Chifuyu, make haste!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, the Ferris wheel! Chifuyu, make haste!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, the Ferris wheel! Chifuyu, make haste!
